# KYRA

> Decentralized banking trust infrastructure. One identity, infinite trust.

KYRA is a prototype web platform demonstrating decentralized identity for
modern banking — powered by Hyperledger Indy, Aries, AnonCreds and
Chainlink CCIP.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Landing page with product overview
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Identity, credentials and account overview
- [Onboarding](/onboarding): Create a decentralized identity and issue credentials
- [KYC Vault](/kyc-vault): Manage verifiable credentials with selective disclosure
- [Loan Center](/loan-center): Loan applications with multi-level approval pipeline
- [Web3 Wallet](/wallet): The flagship wallet — credentials, loans, activity, DID signing
- [Approvals & Tasks](/approvals): Bank staff view for reviewing and signing requests
- [Audit & Reports](/audit): Immutable, real-time event feed
